where.if: AND (m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.email AS email, m.phone AS phone, m.user_status AS user_status, m.live_yn AS live_yn, m.grade AS grade, m.point_balance AS point_balance, m.church_id AS church_id, c.name AS church_name, r.name AS region_name, co.name AS country_name, m.created_at AS created_at FROM MEMBER m JOIN CHURCH c ON m.church_id = c.id JOIN REGION r ON c.region_id = r.id JOIN COUNTRY co ON r.country_id = co.id
ORDER BY ${orderBy} LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT m.id AS id, m.name AS name, m.email AS email, m.phone AS phone, m.user_status AS user_status, m.live_yn AS live_yn, m.grade AS grade, m.point_balance AS point_balance, m.church_id AS church_id, c.name AS church_name, r.id AS region_id, r.name AS region_name, co.id AS country_id, co.name AS country_name, m.created_at AS created_at, m.updated_at AS updated_at FROM MEMBER m JOIN CHURCH c ON m.church_id = c.id JOIN REGION r ON c.region_id = r.id JOIN COUNTRY co ON r.country_id = co.id WHERE m.id = #{id}
